description_long: This is a fixed-blade combat or utility knife featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a sharp point and a metallic sheen, likely made of stainless steel. The blade is long and tapers to a fine tip, suitable for piercing and cutting tasks. The handle is cylindrical, dark green, and appears to be made of a textured, non-slip material, possibly polymer or rubber, with ergonomic grooves for grip. A flat, circular guard separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible decorative elements or engravings. The knife is well-balanced and designed for practical use in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A straight-edged, double-edged knife with a metallic blade and a dark green, textured handle, separated by a flat guard. The design is functional and robust, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade and the cylindrical, grooved green handle with a flat guard.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow blade profile and the circular cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade and handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the thinness of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark green, grooved, textured polymer
